solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    bool isBoomerang(vector<vector<int>>& points) {
        // Check if all three points are distinct
        if (points[0] == points[1] || points[1] == points[2] || points[0] == points[2]) {
            return false;
        }

        // Check if the three points are not collinear using area of triangle formula
        int area = (points[1][0] - points[0][0]) * (points[2][1] - points[0][1]) 
                 - (points[2][0] - points[0][0]) * (points[1][1] - points[0][1]);
        return area != 0;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The solution checks if all three points are distinct and not collinear. It uses the area of triangle formula to determine collinearity. The approach is efficient with constant time and space complexity.>
